subject: API Documentation Access

subject: Duplicate Charge Inquiry
content: Hello, it appears our agency was billed twice this month for our Enterprise subscription. Can you please issue a refund for the duplicate transaction?

content: I've tried resetting my password three times now but the email never arrives. I checked my spam folder too.

subject: Stripe Integration Issue
content: I'm getting a 'Connection Failed' error when trying to link my Stripe account. I am the admin on both platforms. Please help.

subject: Unsubscribe immediately
content: Your software is too complicated and I'm tired of the bugs. Cancel my account and sue me if you want, I'm done!

subject: Asset Approval for PDFs
content: Does the ClientBridge portal support sticky notes on multi-page PDFs, or just single images?
